emails.subject: Guaranty Form
emails.body: Guaranty Form Yes, we do have a standard Enron guaranty form. It is located in atty.fms/swaps/current forms/guaranty.doc (both the Enron counterparty guarantees are in there).

emails.subject: Re: Guaranty Form
emails.body: Re: Guaranty Form Tana I don't believe I asked for this recently. Did you need to respond to somebody else?
